node.text: Joanna enjoys hiking and found some amazing trails in her town.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hike with buddies") on Session 11 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Hiking has opened up a whole new world for Joanna, and she feels like a different person now.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hike with buddies") on Session 11 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna feels calm and peaceful in nature, particularly during her hikes.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hike with buddies") on Session 11 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: In inspiring places like the trails, Joanna feels like writing a drama.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hike with buddies") on Session 11 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna feels like she could write a whole movie when she is in inspiring places like the trails she visits.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hike with buddies") on Session 11 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna found an awesome hiking trail in her hometown that she considers gorgeous and inspiring.
Joanna finds Nate's boldness inspiring and relates it to a gorgeous sunset she saw while hiking.
Joanna submitted a few scripts last week and expects some rejections.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hike with buddies") on Session 27 (Score: 0.69)

node.text: Joanna loves nature and considers it her haven, finding peace and enjoyment in walking in it and feeling its calming effects.
Joanna values Nate's opinion and looks forward to showing him something.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hike with buddies") on Session 13 (Score: 0.56)
